values.name: rule
values.comment:
Reports

  - single-use type variables that don't have a -\_ suffix
  - multi-use type variables that have a -\_ suffix

```
config =
    [ OnlyAllSingleUseTypeVarsEndWith_.rule
    ]
```


### Fail

    a : a

    type A a
        = A

    a : a_ -> a_

    type A a_
        = A a_


### Success

    a : a_

    type A a_
        = A

    a : a -> a

    type A a
        = A a


## Don't use this

When you already use the -\_ suffix in (multi-use) type variables.
